overall.description: A smooth aerial drone shot follows a turquoise river through a misty forest canyon. The camera glides just above the water surface between rocky banks covered in dense vegetation, with atmospheric fog and overcast lighting creating a serene, immersive natural environment. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty forest river canyon with dense vegetation

agents.ego_description: drone gliding smoothly just above the turquoise water surface through the forested canyon

entered.detail: dense green bushes and foliage lining the left riverbank
steep rocky cliff face covered with patches of moss and small trees
deep turquoise water flowing calmly through the canyon
dense forest shrouded in atmospheric mist and fog
large boulders scattered throughout the river channel

segments.scene_description: The drone moves forward through a narrow misty canyon, with dense green vegetation lining the left bank and rocky cliffs on the right. The turquoise river flows calmly below as the camera glides just above the water surface, surrounded by atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky river gorge with clear turquoise water

events.description: water depth decreases becoming more transparent, revealing riverbed rocks beneath the surface

agents.ego_description: continuing along the river as the banks become rockier and the water shallower

entered.detail: exposed rocky shoreline replacing the dense vegetation on the left bank
grass-covered rocky bank on the right side with less cliff exposure

segments.scene_description: As the drone progresses, the left bank transitions from dense bushes to exposed rocky shoreline. The water becomes increasingly shallow and transparent, revealing submerged rocks, while the right bank shows patches of grass among the rocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river section with visible riverbed

events.description: camera slightly adjusts angle while approaching the river bend ahead

agents.ego_description: gliding over the shallow clear water approaching a bend in the river valley

entered.detail: opening in the canyon where the river curves ahead
large dark rock formation protruding from the left bank

segments.scene_description: The drone approaches a bend in the river where the water is shallow and crystal clear, revealing numerous submerged rocks. The surrounding forest remains dense with mist hanging in the valley ahead, while the rocky banks become more prominent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty canyon as the river transforms from a deep turquoise flow into a shallow, crystal-clear stream. It begins gliding just above the water surface through a narrow passage, flanked by dense green vegetation on the left and steep rocky cliffs on the right. As the drone progresses, the lush bushes on the left bank give way to an exposed rocky shoreline, while the water becomes increasingly transparent to reveal submerged stones beneath the surface. The scene then shifts toward a bend in the river where the water turns completely clear and shallow, exposing a bed of numerous rocks. Finally, the camera pushes forward into the valley, where the rocky banks become more prominent against a backdrop of dense forest and lingering atmospheric fog.
